notes: ArabicssSoftphone H_21: The incoming Ringer is now always ON at launch so no agent can miss a call, and 'Generate ringing on outgoing calls' is off. Updates are more reliable - this fixes the 'Download failed' / missing Qt platform plugin error by verifying the new version is complete before replacing your current one, so a failed update never leaves you broken. Optional: click 'Later' to keep working; you'll be reminded next launch. Your saved accounts are preserved.
